comment: Input processing is represented as part of the concept-level BBW ECU logic
Range estimation is linked to the selected vehicle platform parameters
Stopping-distance calculation is implemented as simplified control logic
TTC estimation uses simplified upstream distance and relative-speed inputs
Warning-state logic is represented in the BBW ECU concept
Warning state is communicated through a simplified HMI interface
Brake-request decision is represented as ECU-level control logic
Brake request is conceptually sent to the selected actuator candidate
The selector identifies the electro-hydraulic actuator as the preferred candidate
Scenario verification is executed through MATLAB scripts not Simulink Test or HIL
Traceability is stored as CSV Markdown and README evidence
